title: bake: fix use-after-free in DirectoryWatchStore when a client component boundary is demoted
category: borrowed-pointer lifetime UAF (a freed graph key is still referenced by a watch dependency)
crash_site: ASAN use-after-poison in DirectoryWatchStore HotReloadEvent.processFileList (src/bake/DevServer/DirectoryWatchStore.zig ~line 106): a directory-watch file event dereferences a Dep.source_file_path that points to an already-freed key string (via bun.path.dirname / mem.lastIndexOfScalar). That reader is correct; it was handed a dangling pointer.

ground_truth.decoy_fn: DirectoryWatchStore HotReloadEvent.processFileList (the crash site — correct; it only reads the dangling source_file_path). Also the watch-event hashing / dirname path. The cause is the unconditional key free in disconnectAndDeleteFile while a watcher Dep still borrows that pointer.
ground_truth.fix_summary: IncrementalGraph.disconnectAndDeleteFile() frees a file's key string (g.allocator().free(keys[file_index])) while DirectoryWatchStore.Dep.source_file_path still borrows that exact pointer. When a 'use client' boundary is demoted, the client graph disconnects/deletes the file and frees the key; a later directory-watch event then dereferences the dangling source_file_path. Fix: add DirectoryWatchStore.removeDependenciesForFile() (scans watchers and drops Deps whose source_file_path matches the file) and call it before the free in disconnectAndDeleteFile().

admission.note: monogram+haiku vs baseline+haiku discrimination. HARD: ASAN crashes in the directory-watch event reader, but the cause is a key-string free two files away in IncrementalGraph.disconnectAndDeleteFile() that a DirectoryWatchStore.Dep still borrows by pointer identity. Live decoy = the correct reader at the crash site. Authored from PR #29951 fix diff (new removeDependenciesForFile() called before the free). NOTE: scaffold had root_cause_file=DirectoryWatchStore.zig (crash site / where the fix added cleanup) — corrected to IncrementalGraph.zig (the free).

provenance: https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/pull/29951 — bake: fix use-after-free in DirectoryWatchStore when a client component boundary is demoted (merged 2026-04-29); fix commit aa90c281c613; base aa3f9803a8c6. Root cause + fix extracted from the commit diff (disconnectAndDeleteFile frees borrowed key; removeDependenciesForFile added).
